missionBoundary: This audit checks whether public frusSourceNote provenance follows published FRUS first-footnote order. It does not certify final document-level source notes where page spans, markings, or withdrawal-sheet accounting remain unextracted.
publishedFrusOrder: Repository and collection/file locator first; original classification and handling status next; then distribution, drafting/clearance, place/time, read-status, attachments, annotations, excisions, and related-document evidence as verified from the record.

officialStandardBasis.label: FRUS 1993-2000, Volume XXVII
officialStandardBasis.use: The target volume is still marked Being Researched, so this site should present candidates and source-note leads rather than final publication claims.

officialStandardBasis.label: FRUS 1989-1992, Volume XXXI, About the Series
officialStandardBasis.use: The first footnote should identify the document source, original classification, distribution, drafting information, background, and read-status evidence when known.

officialStandardBasis.label: FRUS 1989-1992, Volume XXXI, Document 73
officialStandardBasis.use: A published Presidential Library example leads with repository, presidential records, collection, file path, and control locator before classification and editorial notes.

officialStandardBasis.label: FRUS 1969-1976, Volume XXVIII, Southern Africa, Document 81
officialStandardBasis.use: A published Southern Africa example leads with repository, collection, box, and folder before classification and handling notes.
